title: thymus hispanicus var. micranthus
intro: Thymus hispanicus var. micranthus, also known as dwarf Spanish thyme, is a low-growing, herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of T. hispanicus var. micranthus include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of T. hispanicus var. micranthus include tea infusions, essential oil, and dried leaf infusions, which can be consumed internally or used topically for therapeutic purposes.
